name: Cursor Survival
short_description: Prepare for a radical shift in Bullet Hell gameplay! In Cursor Survival, you're not piloting a character - you embody the... CURSOR! Unleash a new, utterly insane way to evade, strike, and endure in a chaotic universe of projectiles and adversaries.
detailed_description:
Control the cursor in a Bullet Hell! Cosmic battles, chaotic gameplay, and awesome upgrades!

• Dodge, slice, survive in outer space!

  • Forget traditional ship controls. In Cursor Survival, you are* the cursor!

  • Evade a deadly rain of lasers and projectiles, maneuvering with pinpoint accuracy in the depths of space.

  • Slice enemy ships to pieces like a katana, tearing through hordes of opponents in vibrant cosmic environments.

  • Survive wave after wave, honing your skills and collecting valuable upgrades.

• What awaits you:

  • Unique Gameplay: Innovative cursor-based control in classic Bullet Hell action, set in space!

  • High Replayability: 38 upgrades allow you to create diverse cursor builds and experience a fresh game every time!

  • Diverse Cosmic "Armaments": From a "beam of light" that incinerates ships to powerful blasters!

  • Dynamic and Challenging Gameplay: Test your survival skills and quick decision-making in intense space battles!

  • Vibrant Visual Style: Enjoy colorful cosmic backdrops and stylish enemy ships.

  • Energetic happy hardcore/scenecore soundtrack: Keep up with the insane pace of the game with dynamic music!

Master the intricacies of control and transform your cursor into the deadliest weapon in the universe!

Can you become a cursor master and survive all the waves of chaos in the vast expanse of space? Add Cursor Survival to your library and prepare for a Bullet Hell frenzy where the ultimate weapon is… the cursor!
